scripts.install:deps: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && node server/scripts/ensure-pg-schema.mjs
scripts.install:all: npm run install:deps && npm run db:generate --prefix server
scripts.build:vercel: npm run db:generate --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.build:vercel:migrate: npm run db:generate --prefix server && npm run db:deploy --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
